tracks.title: Full Curriculum
tracks.description: The traditional route. A progressive structure with eligibility for rank promotions. A curriculum currently being used by Lapunti Karilyon and one that I helped design and formalize. Based on traditional Lapunti lessons but structured and supplemented for progressive learning and easier absorption.

tracks.title: Focused Sessions
tracks.description: Modular training. Designed for those who want to learn basic self-defense or focus on particular aspects of the art. For those with limited time or who cannot commit to the full curriculum path.
